chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: The commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.390 — Rules

The commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 870 (H.B.2861), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*

subsections.text: The commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 870 (H.B.2861), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.
